obligations.title: BRSR Core — reasonable assurance
obligations.desc: Independent reasonable assurance of ~46 core ESG KPIs (Scope 1&2 GHG, water, waste/circularity, employee well-being, gender wages, MSME sourcing, RPTs, etc.). Assurance provider must be free of non-audit/consulting ties to the company or group.
obligations.apply: Top 1000 listed entities this year (rolled out from top 150 → 250 → 500 → 1000)

lastUpdate.note: Flagged by daily scan: “United Breweries files BRSR for FY26 with SGS India assurance - scanx.trade”. Review the source and update the details if confirmed.

obligations.title: Value-chain ESG disclosures
obligations.desc: ESG disclosures (per BRSR Core KPIs) for top upstream & downstream partners making up 75% of purchases/sales by value.

obligations.title: Assurance of value-chain disclosures
obligations.desc: Assurance on the ESG disclosures made for value-chain partners.

obligations.title: PPP-adjusted intensity ratios
obligations.desc: Disclose GHG/water/waste intensity ratios adjusted for Purchasing Power Parity, in addition to standard intensity ratios, for global comparability.

obligations.title: India-specific E,S,G parameters in ratings
obligations.desc: ERPs must factor in 14 India/emerging-market parameters (small-town job creation, MSME sourcing, gender wages, RPTs, RegTech compliance, etc.) in at least one rating product.

lastUpdate.note: Flagged by daily scan: “Vedanta 's ESG ratings updated by ESGRisk.ai - Business Upturn”. Review the source and update the details if confirmed.

obligations.title: Core ESG Rating offering
obligations.desc: ERPs without an assurance-based product must launch a 'Core ESG Rating' built only on assured/verified data (e.g. BRSR Core).

obligations.title: 65% AUM in assured companies
obligations.desc: ESG schemes must hold ≥65% of AUM in companies reporting BRSR and providing BRSR Core assurance; no fresh unassured investments during transition.

obligations.title: Independent scheme assurance
obligations.desc: Independent reasonable assurance that the scheme portfolio matches its stated ESG strategy (anti-greenwashing).

obligations.title: Enhanced voting disclosures
obligations.desc: Disclose whether resolutions were supported/opposed for E, S or G reasons; separate ESG vs non-ESG where voting differs.

obligations.title: Annual Fund Manager commentary
obligations.desc: Annual commentary on ESG strategy, engagement, rating-movement tracking and % AUM in non-BRSR companies.

obligations.title: ESG scheme sub-categorisation & naming
obligations.desc: Schemes launched under defined sub-strategies (Exclusions, Integration, Best-in-Class, Impact, Sustainable Objectives, Transition); strategy name must appear in scheme name; ≥80% assets in theme.

lastUpdate.note: Flagged by daily scan: “Strengthening BRSR for climate transition plan disclosures in India - Institute for Energy Economics and Financial Analysis (IEEFA)”. Review the source and update the details if confirmed.

timeline.ts: Comply-or-explain value-chain ESG; assurance extends to top 250.
Final step — widest coverage. Current financial year.

feed.title: Daily scan active — baseline loaded
feed.desc: Compliance register initialised from the SEBI ESG framework. From tomorrow, only genuine changes found by the daily scan appear here.

feed.title: BRSR Core assurance now reaches the top 1000 — includes mid-caps
feed.desc: Final glide-path step: reasonable assurance of BRSR Core applies to the top 1000 listed entities this financial year. Balaji Amines should confirm its market-cap rank and line up an eligible (conflict-free) assurance provider.

feed.title: Value-chain ESG assurance took effect (top 250)
feed.desc: Comply-or-explain assurance on value-chain ESG disclosures became applicable for the top 250 listed entities.

feed.title: ESG scheme investment criteria came into force
feed.desc: ≥65% of ESG-scheme AUM required in companies with BRSR Core assurance.
